final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire [3:0] data,
    input wire control,
    output reg [3:0] q
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (control) begin
            q <= data; // Write data to cell
        end
        // No need for an else case, as q will retain its value (read)
    end
endmodule
